mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVTF_HD ( CTKEY, IVTF_HDKEY, OR_TYPE_CD, WKSTATUS, REQUESTDATE, CONFIRMDATE, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES( #{ctkey}, #{ivtf_hdkey}, '950', '00', #{requestdate, typeHandler=GmtDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{confirmdate, typeHandler=GmtDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey} )

INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVTF_DT ( CTKEY, IVTF_HDKEY, IVTF_DTKEY, WKSTATUS, IVATKEY, OWKEY, ICKEY, EXQTY, CFQTY, UOM, LOGGRPCD, LCKEY, ULCKEY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES( #{ctkey}, #{ivtf_hdkey}, #{ivtf_dtkey}, '00', #{ivatkey}, #{owkey}, #{ickey}, #{mv_qty}, 0, #{uom}, #{loggrpcd}, #{lckey}, #{ulckey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey} )
